results.message: Added tests for 1 file: practices-lookup.ts (12 tests pass). Skipped akasha-core.ts — existing akasha-core.test.ts already provides comprehensive coverage (130 lines, tests AkashaInputSchema, calcular(), and ethical limits).

Audited 2 target test files for tech_debt markers (TODO/FIXME/XXX/HACK); 0 actionable markers found — files are clean. The only matches were the constant identifier TODOS_PILARES (an array of 5 Pilar strings: cabala/astrologia/tantrica/odu/iching), which is just a variable name, not a TODO comment. No code changes required. Pre-existing typecheck errors in packages/core-iching/src/practices.ts are unrelated to target files (test files typecheck clean when scoped). Consistent with prior audit notes from 13:19 and 13:38 today.
results.tool_note: ast_grep not installed in this environment; fell back to grep which is the documented fallback for the same audit pattern used in prior cycles.

results.message: ODUS (ODU_DETALHADO) already exists at traducao-areas.ts:123-247 covering all 9 areas (saude, trabalho, amor, sexualidade, criacao, proposito, familia, espiritualidade, superacao). Task premise of 'Missing: ODUS' is incorrect. The file's actual pattern uses {explicacao, convergencia, tensao, evitar, pratica} (+ requer_terreiro for ODU), not the {name, keywords, contextPatterns} schema described in the task. ASTROLOGIA_DETALHADO uses the same pattern as ODU/CABALA/TANTRA/ICHING. No-op performed: no duplicate added, no commit made.

findings.conclusion: Task is a no-op; ODUS already fully present in committed file. Adding a second ODUS section with the wrong schema would corrupt the curated structure.

results.message: Removed console statements from recommendation-generator.ts (1 console.warn) and akasha-core.ts (7 console.warn across 5 pilares: Cabala, Astrologia, Tantra, Odu, I-Ching). cli.ts had no debug console statements to remove: 3 console.error are real errors (kept per rule), 3 console.log are user-facing CLI output for printHelp() and version display (kept as functional output). Both edited files typecheck clean. Pre-existing typecheck errors in packages/core-iching/ are unrelated.

files_skipped.reason: No debug console statements. console.error (3x) are real errors; console.log (3x) are user-facing CLI output (printHelp + version display).
